suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit local startup smoke evidence for startup/auth features, including the concrete `go run ./cmd/giro` and `curl /health` verification commands in the handoff or transcript.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `credential-resolution-foundation` and `kiro-ide-autodetection-and-fallbacks` changed startup/auth behavior, but their transcripts and handoffs only showed tests/lint/fmt and no local smoke command even though the skill requires a local smoke run on `127.0.0.1:8080`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten TDD/adherence reporting so workers cannot mark `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` when implementation changes happen before failing tests, or explicitly relax the skill if test-first work is optional.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `credential-resolution-foundation` created `internal/auth/source.go` before `internal/auth/source_test.go`, and `env-and-kiro-cli-source-selection` edited `internal/auth/source.go` before creating/updating tests, yet both handoffs still reported `followedProcedure: true` while the skill says to add failing tests first.
